# [Title]

**Created**: YYYY-MM-DD
**Status**: proposed
**Bead**: inbox-xxx (or "none")
**Supersedes**: path/to/old.md (or "none")

<!-- Status lifecycle: proposed → accepted → deprecated | superseded -->

## Context

What problem? Why now? What forces are at play? Links to beads, research,
prior ADRs.

## Decision

The decision that was made. State it in full. Be specific about what was
chosen and what was explicitly rejected.

## Consequences

What becomes easier or harder after this decision? Side effects, trade-offs,
follow-up work required. Both positive and negative consequences.
